# `transactions` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `Transaction`

```prisma
model Transaction {
  id                  String        @id @default(uuid())
  userId              String
  deviceId            String?
  accountId           String
  type                String
  amount              Decimal       @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  category            String
  subcategory         String?
  description         String?
  merchant            String?
  date                DateTime
  tags                Json? // JSON array of tag strings
  attachment          String?
  transferToAccountId String?
  transferType        String?
  expenseMode         String?
  groupExpenseId      String?
  groupName           String?
  splitType           String?
  importSource        String?
  importMetadata      String?
  originalCategory    String?
  importedAt          DateTime?
  dedupHash           String?       @unique
  version             Int           @default(1)
  synced              Boolean       @default(false)
  syncStatus          String        @default("synced")
  createdAt           DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt           DateTime      @updatedAt
  deletedAt           DateTime?
  account             Account       @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  groupExpense        GroupExpense? @relation(fields: [groupExpenseId], references: [id])
  user                User          @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([accountId])
  @@index([category])
  @@index([date])
  @@index([groupExpenseId])
  @@index([syncStatus])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([userId, date])
  @@index([userId, type, date]) // dashboard monthly totals (income/expense by date range)
  @@index([userId, category, date]) // category breakdown queries
  @@index([userId, accountId, date]) // account-level transaction queries
  @@index([userId, deletedAt, date]) // soft-delete filtered date queries
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
